info.title: Azure Document Intelligence
info.description: Azure Document Intelligence extracts text, key-value pairs, tables, and structures from documents using prebuilt and custom AI models. Analyze invoices, receipts, IDs, tax forms, and more.

post.description: Model Context Protocol endpoint for Copilot Studio.
Analyze a document using a prebuilt or custom model. Pass a URL or base64-encoded content. This starts an async operation — use Get Analyze Result to retrieve results.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: Model ID to use for analysis (e.g., prebuilt-read, prebuilt-layout, prebuilt-invoice, prebuilt-receipt, prebuilt-idDocument, prebuilt-tax.us.w2)

parameters.name: queryFields
parameters.description: Comma-separated field names to extract when using queryFields feature

urlSource.description: URL of the document to analyze

202.description: Analysis started. Use the Operation-Location header to poll for results.

Operation-Location.description: URL to poll for the analyze result

get.description: Get the result of a document analysis operation. Poll until status is 'succeeded' or 'failed'.

parameters.name: modelId
parameters.description: Model ID used for the analysis

parameters.name: resultId
parameters.description: Result ID from the analyze operation

analyzeResult.description: Analysis results including pages, tables, documents, and extracted fields

content.description: Full text content extracted from the document

get.description: List all document models in the resource, including prebuilt and custom models.
Get details of a specific document model including its schema and field definitions.

docTypes.description: Document types and their field schemas

post.description: Build a custom document model from labeled training data. This starts a long-running operation.

azureBlobSource.description: Azure Blob storage source for training data

Operation-Location.description: URL to poll for build status

post.description: Create a composed model from a collection of existing custom models.

modelId.description: Unique model identifier for the composed model

Operation-Location.description: URL to poll for compose status

post.description: Generate authorization to copy a model to this resource from another resource.

modelId.description: Model ID for the copy destination

post.description: Copy a custom model to another Document Intelligence resource using a copy authorization.

schema.description: Copy authorization from the target resource

Operation-Location.description: URL to poll for copy status

post.description: Analyze a document and produce output in a specific format (e.g., searchable PDF). This starts an async operation.
Build a custom document classifier from labeled training data.

docTypes.description: Document types with training data sources

Operation-Location.description: URL to poll for build status

get.description: List all custom document classifiers in the resource.
Get details of a specific document classifier.

post.description: Classify a document using a custom classifier. This starts an async operation.

get.description: Get the result of a document classification operation.

parameters.name: resultId
parameters.description: Result ID from the classify operation

get.description: List all long-running operations (model builds, copies, etc.).
Get the status and details of a specific long-running operation.
Get information about the Document Intelligence resource including limits and quotas.
